Bash(cd "/Users/phamthanh/Documents/ESSCA | MSc Finance & Data Analyst/15. Equity Research" && python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('VMC_Sheet9_Financial_Data.xlsx'\)
print\('=== SHEET 9 STRUCTURE ==='\)
print\(f'Workbook contains {len\(wb.sheetnames\)} sheets:'\)
for sheet in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet]
    print\(f'  - {sheet}: {ws.max_row} rows x {ws.max_column} columns'\)

print\('\\n=== SAMPLE DATA ==='\)
ws = wb['Sheet9_Financial_Data']
print\('Sheet 9 first few rows:'\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=10, max_col=5\):
    print\('  ' + ' | '.join\(str\(cell.value\) if cell.value else '' for cell in row\)\)
")
